snapshot.description: Both games were built in sprint-6-7-merged (real GamePage components, API routes, dictionaries) but removed from the codebase on 2026-07-12 — they were never part of a committed sprint and never became 100% functional (PocketBase server client was a permanent stub, so both games only ever served static fallback data with no real classify persistence). Full build reference, file list, and mechanics: @doc/saily-docs/rubin-comet-catchers-gaia-variables-build-reference-archived-2026-07-12. Do not resume speculatively — see that doc's 'Conditions to resume' section (real PocketBase data path + an explicit product commitment to grow MISSION_GAMES past 2, per the decision that superseded multi-puzzle-mission-flow-stays-multi-game).
snapshot.title: Resume Rubin Comet Catchers / Gaia Variables minigames (future)
